ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the user */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the user */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Smoking status of the user */,
  "drink_level" TEXT /* Level of drinking (e.g., abstemious, social drinker) */,
  "dress_preference" TEXT /* User's preference in dress style */,
  "ambience" TEXT /* Preferred social ambience (e.g., family, party) */,
  "transport" TEXT /* Preferred mode of transport */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the user has */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth */,
  "interest" TEXT /* User's interests */,
  "personality" TEXT /* User's personality traits */,
  "religion" TEXT /* User's religion */,
  "activity" TEXT /* User's primary activity (e.g., student, professional) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Favorite color */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kg */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the user */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the user */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the user */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the user */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Political affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_interest FOREIGN KEY ("interest") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_dress_preference FOREIGN KEY ("dress_preference") REFERENCES dress_preferences ("dress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_budget FOREIGN KEY ("budget") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_height FOREIGN KEY ("height") REFERENCES heights ("height_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_drink_level FOREIGN KEY ("drink_level") REFERENCES drink_levels ("drink_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_employment_status FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_transport FOREIGN KEY ("transport") REFERENCES transport_modes ("transport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_ethnicity FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_activity FOREIGN KEY ("activity") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_weight FOREIGN KEY ("weight") REFERENCES weights ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_smoker FOREIGN KEY ("smoker") REFERENCES smoking_statuses ("smoking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_personality FOREIGN KEY ("personality") REFERENCES personality_traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_religion FOREIGN KEY ("religion") REFERENCES religions ("religion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_political_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("political_affiliation") REFERENCES political_affiliations ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest category */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the personality trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religions" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religion */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Name of the religion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the religion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., student, professional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_modes" (
  "transport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport mode */,
  "transport_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transport mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dress_preferences" (
  "dress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dress preference */,
  "dress_name" TEXT /* Name of the dress preference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dress style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_statuses" (
  "smoking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the smoking status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the smoking status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smoking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drink_levels" (
  "drink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drinking level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the drinking level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drinking level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drink_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight category */,
  "range" TEXT /* Weight range (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget level */,
  "budget_level" TEXT /* Name of the budget level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heights" (
  "height_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each height category */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range in meters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the height category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the political affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_id")
)
